name: @cureocity/care-mock-live
description: Cureocity Care — scripted local twin of the Gemini Live WS endpoint (CARE_LIVE_BACKEND=mock). Speaks the exact wire protocol from docs/AI_COUNSELING.md §4 (setupComplete, snake_case transcription events, PCM24 inlineData audio, flag_crisis/end_session tool calls) so the full therapy arc runs offline in dev/CI. A dev tool, NOT a live path.
